# Baraar Sreesha — Applied AI & GTM Engineer

> Applied AI Engineer building agentic pipelines, RAG systems, and GTM/RevOps automation for B2B revenue teams. Based in Bengaluru, India. Available fractional and full-time, remote worldwide.

## Who I am

Baraar Sreesha Sreenivas is an Applied AI Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience shipping production AI systems — not just prototypes. I specialize in the intersection of AI engineering and revenue operations: RAG pipelines, multi-agent LLM workflows, and Clay/n8n/HubSpot automation that actually runs in production.

**Key roles I fit:** Applied AI Engineer · GenAI Engineer · Forward-Deployed Engineer · GTM Engineer · Fractional AI Retainer

## What I build

- **RAG Systems** — multi-document knowledge assistants with hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector), citation-grounded responses, FastAPI deployment
- **Agentic Workflows** — LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen multi-agent systems for autonomous GTM and RevOps tasks
- **GTM Lead Intelligence** — Clay + n8n + HubSpot pipelines replacing expensive data subscriptions with fresher, custom data
- **Document AI** — OCR pipelines, KYC automation, structured data extraction from PDFs and images
- **AI Sales Automation** — personalized pitch deck + email generation in minutes, not hours

## Production case studies

- Replaced $2,000/mo Apollo + ZoomInfo with custom Clay pipeline — 7–14 day data freshness vs 60–90 days
- Built AI pitch deck + email automation for B2B SaaS sales team — 2–4h per deck reduced to <10 min
- Enterprise RAG over 500+ internal PDFs — 30–90 min doc search → <2 min, 100% citation-grounded
- OCR KYC pipeline for Hyderabad Forex Limited — 40% reduction in manual data entry, 30% faster onboarding

## Tech stack

**AI Orchestration:** LangGraph, CrewAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen, AgentZero, LangFlow
**LLM Providers:** OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Azure OpenAI, Groq
**Vector DBs:** Qdrant, Pinecone, FAISS, AstraDB, MongoDB Atlas, BM25 Hybrid
**GTM & RevOps:** Clay, n8n, HubSpot API, Google Maps API, Apollo, ZoomInfo
**Backend:** FastAPI, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, GCP, Nginx
**Observability:** LangSmith, Weights & Biases

## Blog

Production tutorials and case studies on Applied AI engineering:

- [Self-hosting n8n on GCP: A production setup with Docker, PostgreSQL, and Nginx](https://ssbaraar-portfolio.vercel.app/?blog=self-hosting-n8n-on-gcp-production-setup)
- [LangGraph vs CrewAI vs AutoGen: When to use each one — my honest comparison after shipping in all three](https://ssbaraar-portfolio.vercel.app/?blog=langgraph-vs-crewai-vs-autogen-real-comparison)
- [How I replaced a $2,000/month data subscription with a custom Clay pipeline that's actually fresher](https://ssbaraar-portfolio.vercel.app/?blog=replace-2000-mo-apollo-zoominfo-with-clay-pipeline)
